2411.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mansur that he said: I asked Ibrahim about a man who had entered into a kitaba (manumission contract) with his slave, then died leaving behind sons and daughters. He said: "The walaa' belongs to the males, not the females."
2411.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mansur bahwa ia berkata: Aku bertanya kepada Ibrahim tentang seorang laki-laki yang telah membuat perjanjian kitabah (kontrak kemerdekaan) dengan budaknya, kemudian meninggal dan meninggalkan anak-anak laki-laki dan perempuan. Ia berkata: "Walaa' milik anak-anak laki-laki, bukan yang perempuan."

2412.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan that he used to say concerning a woman who died leaving behind a freed slave (mawla): "The walaa' belongs to her sons; when they die, it reverts to her 'ashabah."
2412.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia biasa berkata mengenai seorang perempuan yang meninggal dan meninggalkan budak yang telah dimerdekakan (mawla): "Walaa' milik anak-anak laki-lakinya; ketika mereka meninggal, walaa' kembali kepada 'ashabah-nya."

2413.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: "Women have no share of walaa' whatsoever, except over what they themselves freed."
2413.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: "Perempuan tidak mendapat bagian walaa' sama sekali, kecuali atas apa yang mereka sendiri merdekakan."

2414.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muhammad that he said: A freed slave of 'Umar died, so Ibn 'Umar asked Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him): "Do 'Umar's daughters have any share of his inheritance?" He said: "I see no share for them — but if you wish to give them something, you may."
2414.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muhammad bahwa ia berkata: Seorang budak yang dimerdekakan 'Umar meninggal, maka Ibn 'Umar bertanya kepada Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu): "Apakah putri-putri 'Umar mendapat bagian dari warisannya?" Ia berkata: "Aku tidak melihat bagian untuk mereka — tetapi jika kamu ingin memberi mereka sesuatu, kamu boleh."

2415.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hisham, from his father, that he said: "Walaa' is secured by whoever secures the inheritance."
2415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hisham, dari ayahnya, bahwa ia berkata: "Walaa' dipegang oleh siapa yang memegang warisan."

2416.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Bakr ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm that a woman from the Muharib tribe gifted the walaa' of her freed slave to the slave himself, then freed him. The slave then gifted his own walaa' to 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm. After she died, a dispute was brought to 'Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him). 'Uthman called for witnesses to prove the claim, and when witnesses came forward, he told the freed slave: "Go and take as patron whoever you wish." He chose 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm.
2416.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Bakr ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm bahwa seorang perempuan dari suku Muharib menghadiahkan walaa' budaknya yang dimerdekakan kepada budak itu sendiri, kemudian memerdekakannya. Budak itu kemudian menghadiahkan walaa' dirinya kepada 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm. Setelah perempuan itu meninggal, sengketa dibawa kepada 'Uthman (radhiyallahu 'anhu). 'Uthman meminta kesaksian untuk membuktikan klaim tersebut, dan ketika saksi-saksi datang, ia berkata kepada budak yang dimerdekakan: "Pergilah dan pilih siapa yang kamu mau sebagai pemimpin." Ia memilih 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Amr ibn Hazm.

2417.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the sale of walaa' and the gifting of it."
2417.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang penjualan walaa' dan pemberiannya sebagai hadiah."

2418.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ forbade the sale of walaa' and the gifting of it.
2418.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang penjualan walaa' dan pemberiannya sebagai hadiah.

2419.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said: I heard Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) say: "Walaa' may not be sold and may not be gifted — walaa' belongs to whoever freed the slave."
2419.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata: Aku mendengar Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Walaa' tidak boleh dijual dan tidak boleh dihadiahkan — walaa' milik siapa yang memerdekakan budak."

2420.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Walaa' is a bond like the bond of lineage — it may not be sold and may not be gifted."
2420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: 'Abdullah (ibn Mas'ud, radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Walaa' adalah ikatan seperti ikatan nasab — tidak boleh dijual dan tidak boleh dihadiahkan."

2421.iwh_en: It was narrated from Qatada that al-Hasan and Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib (may Allah be pleased with them) both disapproved of the sale of walaa'.
2421.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Qatada bahwa al-Hasan dan Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) keduanya tidak menyukai penjualan walaa'.

2422.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Walaa' may not be sold — should a man's neck be consumed twice?"
2422.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Walaa' tidak boleh dijual — apakah leher seorang laki-laki boleh dikonsumsi dua kali?"

2423.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The prescribed shares of inheritance are calculated from six — we do not increase them ('awl)."
2423.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Bagian-bagian warisan yang ditetapkan dihitung dari enam — kami tidak menambahnya ('awl)."

2424.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shurayh ibn al-Harith that a dispute was brought to him involving two daughters, two parents, and a husband. He ruled on the matter, but the husband went to complain about him in the mosque. Shurayh sent for the husband and said: "This man thinks I am unjust, while I think him wicked — he displays grievance while hiding a ruling that is sound." The man asked: "What do you say about two daughters, two parents, and a husband?" Shurayh said: "The husband gets one-quarter of the whole estate, the two parents get two-sixths, and what remains goes to the two daughters." The man asked: "Then why did you give me less?" Shurayh replied: "It is not I who gave you less — Allah gave you less. The two daughters get two-thirds, the two parents get two-sixths, and the husband gets one-quarter; the total amounts to seven and a half shares, making your share subject to 'awl (proportional reduction)."
2424.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shurayh ibn al-Harith bahwa sebuah sengketa dibawa kepadanya yang melibatkan dua putri, dua orang tua, dan seorang suami. Ia memutuskan perkara tersebut, tetapi suami pergi mengeluh tentang dia di masjid. Shurayh memanggil suami dan berkata: "Laki-laki ini mengira aku tidak adil, sementara aku mengiranya fasik — ia menampakkan keluhan sambil menyembunyikan putusan yang benar." Laki-laki itu bertanya: "Apa yang kamu katakan tentang dua putri, dua orang tua, dan seorang suami?" Shurayh berkata: "Suami mendapat seperempat dari seluruh harta, dua orang tua mendapat dua perenam, dan sisanya untuk dua putri." Laki-laki itu bertanya: "Lalu mengapa kamu memberi saya lebih sedikit?" Shurayh menjawab: "Bukan aku yang memberi kamu lebih sedikit — Allah yang memberi kamu lebih sedikit. Dua putri mendapat dua pertiga, dua orang tua mendapat dua perenam, dan suami mendapat seperempat; totalnya berjumlah tujuh setengah bagian, sehingga bagianmu terkena 'awl (pengurangan proporsional)."

2425.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that 'Ali, 'Umar, and Zayd (may Allah be pleased with them all) said: "The father pulls the walaa' of his child (to his own masters when he is freed)."
2425.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa 'Ali, 'Umar, dan Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhum) berkata: "Seorang ayah menarik walaa' anaknya (kepada tuannya sendiri ketika ia dimerdekakan)."

2426.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Sha'bi that he said: "The grandfather pulls the walaa' (of his grandchildren to his masters)."
2426.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Sha'bi bahwa ia berkata: "Kakek menarik walaa' (cucunya kepada tuannya)."

2427.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Sirin that Shurayh said: "The father pulls the walaa' of his child."
2427.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Sirin bahwa Shurayh berkata: "Seorang ayah menarik walaa' anaknya."

2428.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Amir (al-Sha'bi) that he was asked about a slave who died having a free father and sons from a free woman: to whom does the walaa' of the sons belong? He said: "To the masters of the grandfather (i.e., the slave's father's masters)."
2428.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Amir (al-Sha'bi) bahwa ia ditanya tentang seorang budak yang meninggal dan memiliki ayah yang merdeka serta anak-anak dari seorang perempuan merdeka: kepada siapakah walaa' anak-anak tersebut? Ia berkata: "Kepada tuan-tuan dari kakek (yaitu tuan-tuan dari ayah budak tersebut)."

2429.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he was asked about a mukatab slave who died having paid half of his kitaba contract, and who had a son from a free woman. He said: "I believe he has already pulled the walaa' of his son (to his masters)."
2429.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia ditanya tentang seorang budak mukatab yang meninggal setelah membayar setengah dari kontrak kitabahnya, dan yang memiliki seorang anak dari perempuan merdeka. Ia berkata: "Aku percaya ia telah menarik walaa' anaknya (kepada tuan-tuannya)."

2430.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: Shurayh would never retract a ruling he had given, until al-Aswad told him that 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "If a slave marries a free woman and she bears him free children, then he is subsequently freed, the walaa' reverts to his masters." Shurayh then adopted this ruling.
2430.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: Shurayh tidak pernah mencabut putusan yang telah ia berikan, sampai al-Aswad menceritakan kepadanya bahwa 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Jika seorang budak menikahi perempuan merdeka dan ia melahirkan anak-anak merdeka baginya, kemudian ia dimerdekakan, maka walaa' kembali kepada tuan-tuannya." Shurayh kemudian mengadopsi putusan ini.

2431.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "If a slave is married to a free woman, the child is freed through his mother's freedom. Then when the father is freed, he pulls the walaa' (to his masters)."
2431.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Jika seorang budak menikahi perempuan merdeka, maka anak dimerdekakan melalui kemerdekaan ibunya. Kemudian ketika ayah dimerdekakan, ia menarik walaa' (kepada tuan-tuannya)."

2432.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that he said concerning a free woman married to a slave: "As for children she bore from him while he was still a slave — their walaa' belongs to the people of her benefactor (her own mawali). As for children she bore from him after he was freed — their walaa' belongs to the people of his benefactor (his mawali)."
2432.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Ata' bahwa ia berkata mengenai perempuan merdeka yang menikah dengan seorang budak: "Adapun anak-anak yang ia lahirkan darinya ketika ia masih budak — walaa' mereka milik keluarga orang yang membebaskan ibunya (mawali-nya). Adapun anak-anak yang ia lahirkan darinya setelah ia dimerdekakan — walaa' mereka milik keluarga orang yang membebaskan ayahnya (mawali-nya)."

2433.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim that he said: 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "If a free woman is married to a slave and she bears him a son, the son is freed through his mother's freedom, and his walaa' belongs to his mother's mawali. Then when the father is freed, he pulls the walaa' to his own masters."
2433.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Jika seorang perempuan merdeka menikah dengan seorang budak dan ia melahirkan seorang putra baginya, putra dimerdekakan melalui kemerdekaan ibunya, dan walaa'nya milik mawali ibunya. Kemudian ketika ayah dimerdekakan, ia menarik walaa' kepada tuan-tuannya sendiri."

2434.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abd al-Rahman ibn al-'Ala' that he said: "My mother was a freed slave of the Huraqa clan, and my father Ya'qub was a mukatab slave of Malik ibn Aws ibn al-Hadathan al-Nasri. My father completed his kitaba contract. The Huraqi man came to 'Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) to claim his right — meaning the walaa' — and Malik ibn Aws was also present and said: 'That one is my freed slave (mawla).' They disputed before 'Uthman, and he ruled in favor of the Huraqi man."
2434.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abd al-Rahman ibn al-'Ala' bahwa ia berkata: "Ibuku adalah budak yang dimerdekakan dari klan Huraqa, dan ayahku Ya'qub adalah budak mukatab milik Malik ibn Aws ibn al-Hadathan al-Nasri. Ayahku menyelesaikan kontrak kitabahnya. Laki-laki dari Huraqa datang kepada 'Uthman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) untuk menuntut haknya — yaitu walaa' — dan Malik ibn Aws juga hadir dan berkata: 'Itu adalah budak bebasanku (mawla).' Mereka bersengketa di hadapan 'Uthman, dan ia memutuskan untuk laki-laki Huraqa."

2435.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahm ibn Yazid al-Hamrawi that a man died without any heir, and a letter was written about him to 'Umar ibn 'Abd al-'Aziz (may Allah be pleased with him) while he was caliph. He wrote back: "Divide his inheritance among those who were registered to receive the stipend (ata') alongside him." So his inheritance was divided among those who had been registered with him in his clan's register.
2435.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahm ibn Yazid al-Hamrawi bahwa seorang laki-laki meninggal tanpa ahli waris, dan sebuah surat ditulis tentang dia kepada 'Umar ibn 'Abd al-'Aziz (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ketika ia menjadi khalifah. Ia membalas: "Bagikan warisannya kepada mereka yang terdaftar menerima tunjangan (ata') bersamanya." Maka warisannya dibagikan kepada mereka yang terdaftar bersamanya dalam register kabilahnya.
